abilities.name: rough-skin
abilities.shortEffect: Damages attacking Pokémon for 1/8 their max HP on contact.
abilities.effect: Whenever a move makes contact with this Pokémon, the move's user takes 1/8 of its maximum HP in damage. This ability functions identically to Iron Barbs.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon's rough skin damages attackers that make direct contact with it.

abilities.name: speed-boost
abilities.shortEffect: Raises Speed one stage after each turn.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon's Speed rises one stage after each turn.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon's Speed stat is boosted every turn.
